meaning: n.(植物的)木髓,骨髓,重要部分,核心,意义,精华,精力vt.除去木髓,杀死
examples: Ferreous mesua is qualitative firm and heavy, duramen is damask, pith line fine beauty, make furniture with its, wear well.
Peel the oranges, removing the white pith and slice into 4mm slices.
Don't eat the whole peel, but keep the pith, that white, stringy stuff.
Grate the lemon peel into the same bowl, taking care to avoid the white pith.
To section the fruit, first remove the skin and pith with a sharp paring knife.
